results.compiled_code:
with left_table as (

  select
    place_of_service_concept_id as id

  from "awsdatacatalog"."omop_etl_ent"."care_site"

  where place_of_service_concept_id is not null
    and place_of_service_concept_id not in (0, -99)

),

right_table as (

  select
    concept_id as id

  from "awsdatacatalog"."omop_etl_ent"."concept"

  where concept_id is not null
    and 1=1

),

exceptions as (

  select
    left_table.id,
    right_table.id as right_id

  from left_table

  left join right_table
         on left_table.id = right_table.id

  where right_table.id is null

)

select * from exceptions

where parent.to_field is null
